OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: Apex Integration Procudure

omniProcessElements.name: ErrorResponse
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "elementValueMap" : { }, "responseFormat" : "", "isActive" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "executionConditionalFormula" : "(%Remote:error% != 'OK' AND ISNOTBLANK(%Remote:error%)) OR %Remote:errorCode% != 'INVOKE-200'", "additionalOutput" : { "success" : false, "error" : "Failed: Invalid Record ID or missing data. Please check your input." }, "sendJSONPath" : "", "id" : "", "restOptions" : { }, "sendJSONNode" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: Remote
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "remoteOptions" : { "useSystemContext" : true }, "remoteMethod" : "updateQuadMeeting", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "elementValueMap" : { }, "failOnStepError" : false, "internalNotes" : "", "isActive" : true, "chainOnStep" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "remoteClass" : "GuestRecordUpdater", "actionMessage" : "", "additionalOutput" : { "" : "" }, "sendJSONPath" : "CashFlow", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "id" : "", "additionalInput" : { "RecordId" : "%recordId%" }, "restOptions" : { }, "sendJSONNode" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: SuccessResponse
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "elementValueMap" : { }, "responseFormat" : "", "isActive" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "executionConditionalFormula" : "(%Remote:error% == 'OK' OR ISBLANK(%Remote:error%)) AND %Remote:errorCode% == 'INVOKE-200'", "additionalOutput" : { "success" : true, "DebugSpy" : "%Remote%" }, "sendJSONPath" : "", "id" : "", "restOptions" : { }, "sendJSONNode" : "" }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : { }, "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "transientValues" : { "activateOrDeactivateConsent" : false } }
